articles.title: Nurses are back at Brigham and Women’s Hospital, but the fight is not over
articles.description:
The historic nursing strike is over, but negotiations between the union and the hospital over wages and better workplace protections continue.

The post Nurses are back at Brigham and Women’s Hospital, but the fight is not over appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Nurses return to Brigham and Women’s Hospital after a historic strike.
Negotiations for better wages and workplace protections are ongoing.
Local patients may experience improved care as staffing stabilizes.

articles.title: These are the beaches closed in Mass. as the latest heat wave hits
articles.description:
About 50 beaches were deemed unfit for swimming as of Monday.

The post These are the beaches closed in Mass. as the latest heat wave hits appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: About 50 beaches in Massachusetts are closed for swimming due to heat wave conditions.
Beaches were deemed unfit for swimming as of Monday, affecting local recreation options.
Boston residents may need to seek alternative cooling spots during the ongoing heat wave.

articles.title: 17-year-old drowns in Fall River pond
articles.description:
The incident happened Sunday night.

The post 17-year-old drowns in Fall River pond appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 17-year-old drowned in a Fall River pond on Sunday night.
The incident highlights ongoing safety concerns at local swimming areas.
Community members are urged to prioritize water safety to prevent future tragedies.

articles.title: Ranking Bruins’ top 10 prospects: Who stands out in Boston’s growing pipeline?
articles.description:
James Hagens, Dean Letourneau, and Will Zellers are leading the way in Boston's prospect pool.

The post Ranking Bruins’ top 10 prospects: Who stands out in Boston’s growing pipeline? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: James Hagens, Dean Letourneau, and Will Zellers lead Boston's top 10 NHL prospects.
The Bruins' prospect pool is expanding, enhancing future team competitiveness.
Local fans can expect increased talent and excitement in upcoming seasons.
